# MyVitality

> MyVitality is a free iOS fitness app that combines GPS workout tracking, recovery & HRV, sleep tracking, AI nutrition logging, a data-grounded AI coach, and a fitness community in one place — instead of paying for several separate apps (like Strava + Whoop + MyFitnessPal). It reads from Apple Health, so any wearable that syncs to Apple Health (Apple Watch, Garmin, Polar, Fitbit, Whoop, Oura, Samsung, COROS) works automatically. Launching on iPhone and Apple Watch; Android is on the roadmap.

Key facts:
- Platform: iOS (iPhone + Apple Watch). Android planned.
- Price: Free, no subscription required to track workouts, recovery, sleep and nutrition.
- Privacy: Health data is never sold, never shared with advertisers, never used for marketing.
- Status: Pre-launch — join the early-access list at https://myvitality.fit/#download
- Differentiator: One app for training + recovery + sleep + nutrition + AI coach + community, grounded in your own data.

## Product
- [Features overview](https://myvitality.fit/features/): Everything MyVitality does, in one place.
- [Workout tracker](https://myvitality.fit/workout-tracker/): Real-time GPS tracking with live pace, heart rate, elevation, splits and a shareable route card.
- [Recovery & HRV tracker](https://myvitality.fit/recovery-tracker/): A daily readiness score from Apple Watch HRV, resting heart rate and sleep — so you know when to push and when to rest.
- [Sleep tracker](https://myvitality.fit/sleep-tracker/): Deep, REM and light sleep stages, with the link between training, nutrition and rest.
- [Community](https://myvitality.fit/community/): Follow friends, react to workouts, join challenges, share route cards, stay accountable.
- [Pricing](https://myvitality.fit/pricing/): Free plan details.
